title: Echowave — Social Media Platform
description: A full-stack social media platform built with the MERN stack, featuring user authentication, post creation, likes, comments, real-time notifications, and a clean, responsive UI. Developed to understand end-to-end scalable architecture and deployment workflows.

title: StorySphere — SaaS Story Platform
description: A Next.js 15 SaaS storytelling platform with authentication, user dashboards, MDX-powered story writing, AI-ready architecture, AWS S3 uploads, Prisma ORM, and SEO-optimized public story pages. Includes edge-optimized APIs, server actions, and a modern editor.

title: EventReply — Event Invitations & Guest Management
description: A production-grade event management platform built with Angular & Ionic serving 10K+ users. Includes dynamic invitation flows, QR verification, WhatsApp automation, credits system, CSV uploads, referral tracking and Sentry-based error monitoring

title: Frensy — Home Services App
description: A cross-platform Ionic application for booking home services like cleaning, repairs, and appliance maintenance. Features location-based service discovery, provider assignment, secure authentication, order tracking, and a clean customer-first interface.

title: VVIT Learnspace — Educational Platform
description: A digital learning portal created for VVIT students featuring course materials, announcements, student dashboards, and responsive layouts. Designed with a clean academic UI and optimized for fast browsing and mobile usability.

title: Portfolio Website
description: A modern, animated, responsive portfolio built with Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and MDX for blogs. Includes dark/light mode, smooth transitions, SEO optimization, routed pages, and a clean developer-centric design.
